🎭 Motion capture is how we bridge the gap between real human performance and animated characters.
Every gesture, every subtle weight shift, every head tilt captured from real actors and translated directly into our 3D characters. This is what makes animation feel alive rather than procedural.

At Arteki Studio, motion capture is not a post-production add-on. It is built into our pipeline from day one. Our facility in Europe is one of the largest purpose-built mocap stages on the continent, designed specifically for animated feature production 🎬
The result: characters that move the way people actually move. Natural timing, authentic emotion, physical weight you can feel through the screen ✨

We combine this with real-time virtual production in Unreal Engine 5, so directors can see final-quality characters performing live on set making creative decisions in the moment instead of waiting months for renders 🚀
